types1:Item.types1:Name: Search_Products
types1:Item.types1:Description: Process that uses all required inputs to search for and retrieve a list of matching product records within Informatica Product 360

process.name: Search_Products
process.description: Process that uses all required inputs to search for and retrieve a list of matching product records within Informatica Product 360

parameter.description: Maximum number of matching records that the action should retrieve
parameter.name: NumberOfRecordsReturn

service.title: Search API Entity With No Desc
